author: SarahTina
text:
SafetyWing (YC W18) | Partnerships Manager | 100% Remote | Hiring Globally

At SafetyWing, we’re building a global social safety net for remote workers — simple health, insurance, and retirement products designed to replace national welfare systems. Our mission is to remove geographical borders as a barrier to equal opportunity and freedom for everyone.

Our ambassador program has been one of the most powerful growth channels for Nomad Insurance Essential since 2019, driving more than 35% of sales. This Partnerships Manager role brings that proven model to a new b2c product: Nomad Insurance Complete. You'll be among the first dedicated to building its ambassador program from the ground up. Experiment, source, pitch, onboard and grow.

SafetyWing is a team of ~150, fully remote since day 1, globally distributed, and async-first by nature.

We look forward to hearing from you! Apply via the link here: https://safetywing.pinpointhq.com/postings/df3a7344-aa17-4695-a62a-314e3ea4f066?utm_medium=other&utm_source=HN
